name: Raqs-e-Bismil
overview: Raqs-e-Bismil (Urdu: رقص بسمل‎, lit. 'Dance of the Wounded') is a Pakistani television series premiered on Hum TV from 25 December 2020 to 9 July 2021. It is produced by Shazia Wajahat under Showcase Productions. It features Imran Ashraf and Sarah Khan in leads. It is digitally available on Hum TV's YouTube channel.
